name: Contact Form
description: Working contact form with validation, honeypot spam protection, file attachment, and department dropdown.

standard.description: Full contact form with all fields

compact.description: Simplified contact form with minimal fields

visual_brief: Vertically stacked form with a header (title and short description), input fields for name, email, department dropdown, subject, and a multiline message textarea. An optional file attachment area with a paperclip icon sits below the textarea. A honeypot field is hidden from visual display. The submit button is primary-colored at the bottom. Success state replaces the form with a checkmark icon and confirmation message. Compact preset removes the department dropdown and attachment area. An optional contact-info sidebar shows phone, email, and address.

responsive.mobile: Full-width form with stacked fields. Submit button goes full-width. Contact info section moves below the form. File attachment uses native file picker.
responsive.tablet: Form centered at 500px max-width. Contact info appears beside the form if space allows.
responsive.desktop: Form at 500px max-width centered or beside a contact info panel. Generous padding and spacing.
